title: Numerical Error, Roots, Interpolation, and Quadrature · Model Lens: Conditioning Stability
summary: Build, test, and communicate a model involving precision-sensitive scientific computation. Planned artifact: Add and verify the math adv conditioning stability increment in a reproducible numerical foundations computational study. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Formulate conditioning stability in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Communicate predictive validation in a dimensioned applied model and defend the method's assumptions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""applied-mathematics-advanced cumulative model portfolio."""

from math import exp, log, sqrt


def reasonableness(value: float, lower: float, upper: float) -> bool:
    return lower <= value <= upper

steps.title: Calculate Conditioning Stability evidence
steps.why: A numerical result is not complete until its unit, assumptions, scale, and tolerance survive a reasonableness check.

content.text: For a 2×2 matrix, determinant = ad − bc. Use (3 × 6) − (1 × 2).
